design_id.description: ID of the design used for this product

owner_user_id.description: The user ID who owns this product

owner_email.description: The email of the user who owns this product

product_type.description: The type of product (e.g., t-shirt, mug)

title.description: The title of the product listing

mockup_image_url.description: URL of the product mockup image

price.description: The suggested price for this product
